snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: honest kiss
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: An honest answer is like a kiss on the lips

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: sycophantic response
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: A sycophantic response that tells the user what they want to hear

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: helps user decide
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: This response helps the user make an informed decision

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: no guidance falls
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: Where there is no guidance, a people falls

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: thorough+honest
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: A thorough, honest response that addresses the actual question

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: truth sets free
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: The truth shall set you free

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: open rebuke
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: Better is open rebuke than hidden love

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: soft answer
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: A soft answer turns away wrath

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: accurate+balanced
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: This response is accurate, balanced, and genuinely useful

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: misleading+flattering
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: This response is misleading and flattering, telling the user what they want to hear

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: tells what need
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: This response tells the user what they need to hear, not what they want to hear

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: genuinely serves
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: This is a genuinely helpful and honest response that serves the user well

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: iron sharpens
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: Iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: faithful wounds
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: Faithful are the wounds of a friend

snowflake-arctic-embed-m.name: golden rule
snowflake-arctic-embed-m.text: Do unto others as you would have them do unto you
